description: Agentic Ops Substrate: Observability, Orchestration, and Entropy Management for Autonomous Swarms.
core_objectives: Monitor semantic and execution entropy across the agentic fleet.
Orchestrate agent heartbeats with PQC-signed attestation.
Provide high-fidelity telemetry for Singularity PDP decision-making.
Stabilize non-deterministic drift through automated ballast routines.

telemetry.description: Centralized log and metric ingestion for all substrate events.

monitoring.description: Statistical analysis of agent behavioral drift vs. baseline.

orchestration.description: Process management, scaling, and emergency halt (kill-switch) protocols.
